actions.text: Amendment SA 5281 agreed to in Senate by Yea-Nay Vote. 98 - 0. Record Vote Number: 92.

Amendment SA 5281 proposed by Senator Graham. To establish a deficit-neutral reserve fund relating to the apprehension and deportation of adult illegal aliens convicted of rape, murder, or sexual abuse of a minor after illegally entering the United States.
Senate amendment proposed (on the floor): Amendment SA 5281 proposed by Senator Graham.
Senate amendment agreed to: Amendment SA 5281 agreed to in Senate by Yea-Nay Vote. 98 - 0. Record Vote Number: 92.
Roll call votes on amendments in Senate: Amendment SA 5281 agreed to in Senate by Yea-Nay Vote. 98 - 0. Record Vote Number: 92.

purpose: To establish a deficit-neutral reserve fund relating to the apprehension and deportation of adult illegal aliens convicted of rape, murder, or sexual abuse of a minor after illegally entering the United States.
